title: IN-HOME SAFETY AND REUNIFICATION SERVICES - 211info
text: OPTIONS COUNSELING AND FAMILY SERVICES BEAVERTON IN-HOME SAFETY AND REUNIFICATION SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides intensive safety and reunification services (ISRS) including parent skills training, help accessing community resources, and support for families with children returning from or at risk of out of home placement. 8285 SW Nimbus Avenue Suite 148 Beaverton, OR 97008 Eligibility: Parents of children who are returning from or at risk of out-of-home placement Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-6pm (503) 352-3260 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Reception (503) 352-3260 Beaverton Office INTAKE PROCEDURE: Must be referred to by Child Welfare case managers FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Clatsop, Columbia, and Washington Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-6pm Services: Case/Care Management * At Risk Families Family Preservation Programs Home Based Parenting Education * At Risk Families Other Services Offered At This Location: COUNSELING APPROACHES - MENTAL HEALTH COUNSELING AND PSYCHIATRY INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PARENTING CLASSES MUTUAL SUPPORT - KEEP If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OPTIONS COUNSELING AND FAMILY SERVICES BEAVERTON
